hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||i.tool_input?.path||'';if(/\.go$/.test(p)){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('go fmt '+p,{stdio:'pipe'});console.error('[Hook] go fmt: '+p)}catch(e){console.error('[Hook] go fmt failed: '+e.message)}}}catch{}console.log(d)})"
